# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

parameters:
  - name: location
    type: string
  
variables:
  sqlAdminPassword: 'AzureSQL2024!'
  deploymentLocationAlias: toLower(concat('{0}', parameters('location')))

resources:
- provider: "Microsoft.Sql/servers"
  type: "sqlservers"
  name: "${variables['deploymentLocationAlias']}-sqldbserver123456789abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ-srv"
  sku: "Standard_S0" # Standard S0 - $/month or Basic Tier (unlimited data storage, unrestricted compute)
  
  apiVersion: "2017-12-01"   
    
properties:
  administratorLogin: 'sa'      
  administratorLoginPassword: var.sqlAdminPassword         # encrypted in template          
         
# SQL database name           
resources:     
 - provider: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases       
   type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases"   
   dependsOn: ["${variables['deploymentLocationAlias']}-sqldbserver123456789abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ-srv"]    
   name: "${variables['deploymentLocationAlias']}-sqldb123456789abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ-db"      
    databaseName: "masterDB${variables['deploymentLocationAlias']}"      # make sure you have enough permission on master DB to create a new one 
   location: "[parameters('location')]"
